Preferred_Parent.Parent_String: service industry buildings [300129541], commercial buildings [300005147], single built works by function [300004894], single built works by specific type [300004795], single built works (built environment) [300004790], Single Built Works (hierarchy name) [300004789], Built Environment (hierarchy name) [300264550], Objects Facet [300264092]

Descriptive_Note.Note_Text: Buildings designed or maintained as houses of prostitution.
Edificio diseñado o mantenido como casa de prostitución.
Wordt gebruikt voor gebouwen die zijn bestemd of worden gedoogd voor de prostitutie.
Gebäude, die als Bordell geplant oder als solche unterhalten werden.
المباني المصممة أو التي تم تخصيصها كبيوت للدعارة.
